title: Golemancy Unofficial Port
description: Golemancy is a mod about capturing the souls of mobs, breeding them, and using them to create faithful golem servants to do your bidding.
body:
THIS WILL BE DEPRECATED WHEN THE ORIGINAL DEV RETURNS [![ScalaCube](https://scalacube.com/images/banners/modpack.jpg 'Need a server? Try out ScalaCube today!')](https://scalacube.com/p/_hosting_server_minecraft/1203105)

Golemancy

Golemancy is a mod about capturing the souls of mobs, breeding them, and using them to create faithful golem servants to do your bidding. You can create golems that will fight for you, gather items, and otherwise automate your Minecraft world! This mod is for Fabric, and no Forge port is currently planned.

 

For more information on how to get started with this mod, check out the wiki!

Requirements

  • Quilted Fabric API
  • Cloth Config API v6.2.57+
  • ModMenu is not required, but is supported.

Credits

Some textures are adapted from the excellent Malcolm Riley's unused-textures repository, namely:

  • The soul mirror item.
  • The soul grafter block.
  • The soulstone item.

These assets are licensed under CC BY 4.0.
